name: execute_command
description: Execute arbitrary shell command and return full output.

connect_timeout.description: Connection timeout for curl commands (e.g. 10s, default: 10s)

max_time.description: Max transfer time for curl commands (e.g. 30s, default: matches --timeout)

name: web_search_you
description: Perform a high-quality web search using the You.com Search API.

limit.description: Default: 5, Max: 20 - Maximum number of results to return

offset.description: Default: 0, Max: 9 - Number of pages to skip

include_domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to prioritize

exclude_domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to block
